/usr/bin/cc -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/rtp_decoder.dir/test/rtp_decoder.c.o CMakeFiles/rtp_decoder.dir/test/getopt_s.c.o CMakeFiles/rtp_decoder.dir/test/util.c.o -o rtp_decoder  libsrtp2.a -lpcap /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.2/lib/libcrypto.dylib
